name: fincalci
description: FinCalci — All-in-One Indian Calculator. 20 calculators, 60+ tools. Free. No ads.
author: FinCalci Apps <fincalci.help@gmail.com>

scripts.build: vite build && mkdir -p sourcemaps && mv dist/assets/*.map sourcemaps/ 2>/dev/null || true && node scripts/prerender-seo.mjs
scripts.deploy: bash quality-check.sh && vitest run && vite build && mkdir -p sourcemaps && mv dist/assets/*.map sourcemaps/ 2>/dev/null || true && node scripts/prerender-seo.mjs
